content: Phase 1: Database schema for users, quiz ownership, and quiz history
Phase 2: Backend auth system (express-session, bcrypt, signup/login/logout API)
Phase 3: Auth UI pages (signup, login, nav updates with user display)
Phase 5: User profiles system (display name, avatar, public /u/username page)
Phase 6: My Quizzes dashboard (/dashboard page showing created quizzes)
Phase 7: Quiz history tracking and leaderboard integration
activeForm: Building quiz history and leaderboard integration
